meanings.usage: 指官方的新闻报道或公告信息
指在电视或广播中播报新闻的人
指意大利通心粉，是一种意大利面食
指从事农作物种植的人
用于形容质量、状况或外观非常好
指农作物的收割季节或收获量
指用机械或手工方法使谷物脱离秸秆
指对原材料进行加工处理使其变成产品
指多人参与的争夺名次的活动
指比赛或竞赛中的获胜者
指广播、电视节目的录制场所
指将分散的东西集中在一起

meanings.meaning: 主要的；领先的；最重要的
meanings.usage: 用于形容在某一领域最重要或最成功的
指负责管理某企业或部门的人

phrases.usage: 转向；切换到，指新闻报道中切换到另一个地点或话题

examples.en: We're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria.
examples.zh: 我们现在转向意大利卡拉布里亚的通心粉田地。

examples.en: Let's go over to our correspondent in Beijing.
examples.zh: 让我们切换到在北京的记者。

phrases.usage: 日夜不停地；夜以继日，形容持续不断的工作或活动

examples.en: The whole village has been working day and night.
examples.zh: 整个村子一直在日夜不停地工作。

examples.en: She studied day and night before the exam.
examples.zh: 考试前她夜以继日地学习。

phrases.usage: 他们两个一起；总共，用于指两个人共同完成某事

examples.en: Two workers who, between them, have just finished cutting three cartloads.
examples.zh: 两个工人，他们一起刚割完三车的通心粉茎。

examples.en: Between them, they have visited over 50 countries.
examples.zh: 他们两个总共访问了50多个国家。

phrases.usage: 自...以来每一年，表示从过去某时起每年都发生的动作

examples.en: He has won it every year since 1991.
examples.zh: 自1991年以来他每年都赢得比赛。

examples.en: She has called me every year since we graduated.
examples.zh: 自我们毕业以来她每年都给我打电话。

phrases.usage: 收割满车的...，表示收获大量的农作物

examples.en: They have just finished cutting three cartloads of golden brown macaroni stalks.
examples.zh: 他们刚收割完三车金黄色的通心粉茎。

phrases.usage: 帮助某人...时间，表示持续帮助的时长

examples.en: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now.
examples.zh: 她帮丈夫干活到现在已经三十年了。

examples.en: He has been helping his father in the shop for five years.
examples.zh: 他在店里帮父亲干活已经五年了。

phrases.usage: 收获结束时；收割的尾声

examples.en: This shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest.
examples.zh: 这向你展示收获结束时会发生什么。

phrases.usage: 将要；打算，表示将来的计划或即将发生的事

examples.en: We're going over to the macaroni fields.
examples.zh: 我们将去通心粉田地。

examples.en: We're now going back to the studio.
examples.zh: 我们现在要回到演播室。

phrases.usage: 比往常早，表示比正常时间提前

examples.en: Harvesting has begun earlier than usual.
examples.zh: 收割比往常开始得更早。

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示一个动作从过去开始，一直持续到现在，并且可能继续下去。强调动作的持续性。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 用于描述持续性的动作，常与 for + 时间段、since + 时间点、all + 时间段等时间状语连用。

examples.en: They have been expecting a splendid crop this year.
examples.zh: 他们一直期待着今年有个好收成。

examples.en: She has been helping her husband for thirty years.
examples.zh: 她帮丈夫干活已经三十年了。

examples.en: The whole village has been working day and night.
examples.zh: 整个村子一直在日夜不停地工作。

grammar.title: 时间状语 since 和 for 的用法
grammar.definition: since 表示从过去的某一时间点开始，for 表示一段时间。两者都可与现在完成时连用。
grammar.structure: since + 过去时间点/过去发生的动作；for + 一段时间
grammar.usage: since 后接具体时间点或从句，for 后接表示时间长度的词。

examples.en: Macaroni has been grown in this area for over six hundred years.
examples.zh: 这个地区种植通心粉已有六百多年。

examples.en: He has won it every year since 1991.
examples.zh: 自1991年以来他每年都赢得比赛。

examples.en: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now.
examples.zh: 她帮丈夫干活到现在已经三十年了。

grammar.title: 关系代词 who 引导的定语从句
grammar.definition: who 是关系代词，用于指人，在定语从句中作主语，先行词通常是人。
grammar.structure: 先行词 + who + 谓语动词 + 其他成分
grammar.usage: 用来修饰前面的名词或代词，提供额外信息。who 在从句中代替先行词并在从句中担任成分。

examples.en: Here you can see two workers who, between them, have just finished cutting three cartloads.
examples.zh: 在这里你可以看到两个工人，他们一起刚割完三车的通心粉茎。

examples.en: Signor Fratelli, the present champion, has won it every year since 1991.
examples.zh: 弗拉特利先生，现任冠军，自1991年以来每年都赢得比赛。

sentencePatterns.pattern: We're going over to + 地点/话题

original.en: We're going over to the macaroni fields of Calabria.
original.zh: 我们现在转向意大利卡拉布里亚的通心粉田地。

imitations.en: We're going over to our London studio.
imitations.zh: 我们现在切换到伦敦演播室。

imitations.en: We're going over to see what happened at the scene.
imitations.zh: 我们现在转到现场看看发生了什么。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has been + doing sth. + for/since + 时间

original.en: She has been helping her husband for thirty years now.
original.zh: 她帮丈夫干活到现在已经三十年了。

imitations.en: He has been learning English for five years.
They have been waiting for you since 9 o'clock.
imitations.zh: 他们从九点起就一直在等你。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Here you can see + 主语 + doing sth.

original.en: Here you can see two workers who have just finished cutting.
original.zh: 在这里你可以看到两个刚完成收割的工人。

imitations.en: Here you can see students who have been studying all night.
imitations.zh: 在这里你可以看到整晚一直在学习的学生们。

imitations.en: Here you can see farmers who are harvesting crops.
imitations.zh: 在这里你可以看到正在收割农作物的农民们。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has won it every year since + 年份

original.en: Signor Fratelli has won it every year since 1991.
original.zh: 弗拉特利先生自1991年以来每年都赢得比赛。

imitations.en: She has been the class monitor every year since 2020.
imitations.zh: 她自2020年以来每年都是班长。

imitations.en: He has taken first prize every year since he joined the club.
imitations.zh: 自他加入俱乐部以来他每年都拿一等奖。
